files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.ConstraintBinding
files.Summary: Defines how a constraint should follow a target transform.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.ConstraintFollower
files.Summary: Controls IK constraint targets by following assigned transform references. Allows toggling position/rotation constraints independently for hands, legs, and head.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.ConstraintTarget
files.Summary: Represents a single constraint target that can be assigned to follow a source transform. Provides fine-grained control over position and rotation constraints.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.ConstraintTargetController
files.Summary: Main controller for managing multiple constraint targets. Attach this to your character and assign transform references to make constraints follow targets.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.Editor.ConstraintTargetControllerEditor
files.Summary: Custom editor for ConstraintTargetController with improved UI.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.Editor.RigReferencesEditor
files.Summary: Custom editor for RigReferences with quick actions.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.Editor.RigSetupQuickMenu
files.Summary: Quick access menu item

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.Editor.RigSetupWindow
files.Summary: Editor window for setting up Animation Rigging on humanoid characters. Automatically detects bones or allows manual assignment.

files.Title: WitShells.AnimationRig.RigReferences
files.Summary: Holds references to all IK constraints and provides easy access to targets and weights. Attach this component to the Rig GameObject.

files.Title: WitShells.Broadcast.BroadcastSender
files.Summary:
Sends UDP broadcast packets with optional periodic modes. Modes:

  • LoopSingle: repeat the same message at a fixed interval.
  • UntilResponse: repeat until a response is observed (subscribe to a BroadcastService instance).
  • RetryOnFailure: re-send only when local send throws; limited attempts.

files.Title: WitShells.Broadcast.BroadcastService
files.Summary: Listens for UDP responses on a given port and raises events. Usage: var svc = new BroadcastService(); svc.OnResponseReceived += (msg, remote) => { ... }; svc.StartBroadcast("ip_request", port: 7777, repeatIntervalMs: 0, waitForResponses: true, singleResponse: false); svc.Stop(); svc.Dispose();

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.Brush
files.Summary: Defines brush settings and properties for drawing.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.BrushSettingsUI
files.Summary: Brush settings UI panel that reads/writes to DrawToolSettings.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.ColorPickerUI
files.Summary: Color picker UI with hue bar, saturation/value square, and alpha slider. Supports color history and direct input.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.DrawCanvasUI
files.Summary: Main drawing canvas UI component. Manages the layer container and provides zoom/pan functionality. Each layer is now a separate RawImage GameObject for mobile performance.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.DrawToolController
files.Summary: Main controller that wires all drawing tool components together. This is the primary entry point for the drawing tool. Uses DrawToolSettings ScriptableObject as single source of truth for all settings.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.DrawToolSettings
files.Summary: ScriptableObject that holds all drawing tool settings. This is the single source of truth for brush, color, and canvas settings.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.DrawingEngine
files.Summary: Handles drawing operations on LayerObject. Uses DrawToolSettings ScriptableObject as single source of truth for brush settings. OPTIMIZED: Uses FastTextureBuffer for high-performance Android drawing.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.DrawingInput
files.Summary: Handles all input for the drawing tool using New Input System. Supports mouse, touch, and provides base for pen input.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.Editor.CanvasDrawToolSetup
files.Summary: Editor utility for quick setup of Canvas Draw Tool on a Canvas.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.Editor.DrawToolControllerEditor
files.Summary: Custom inspector for DrawToolController with full testing capabilities. Uses DrawToolSettings for all brush and color operations.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.Editor.DrawingEngineEditor
files.Summary: Custom inspector for DrawingEngine with tool and brush controls. Uses DrawToolSettings for brush and color operations.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.Editor.LayerManagerEditor
files.Summary: Custom inspector for LayerManager with visual layer preview. Updated for LayerObject-based system with individual RawImage per layer.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.Editor.PenInputEditor
files.Summary: Custom inspector for PenInput with pressure and pen settings.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.FastTextureBuffer
files.Summary: High-performance texture buffer using byte array for Android optimization. Based on DirectTextureDrawing approach for maximum performance. Uses direct byte manipulation instead of Color struct for speed. (Android optimized)

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.ImageSelectionManager
files.Summary: Manages selection of imported images and their transform handlers. Handles click-to-select, deselection, and transform mode toggling.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.ImageTransformHandler
files.Summary: Handles transform operations (move, scale, rotate) for imported images. Maintains aspect ratio during scaling. Provides visual handles at corners and edges.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.LayerItemUI
files.Summary: Individual layer item UI component. Updated for LayerObject-based system.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.LayerManager
files.Summary: Manages all layers as separate RawImage GameObjects for high performance on mobile. Each layer is a LayerObject with its own texture and transform capabilities.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.LayerObject
files.Summary: Represents a single layer as a RawImage GameObject for high performance on mobile. Uses FastTextureBuffer for optimized pixel operations. Each layer can be independently positioned, scaled, rotated and cropped.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.LayerPanelUI
files.Summary: Layer panel UI for managing layers. Displays layer list with visibility, lock, and selection controls. Updated for LayerObject-based system.

files.Title: WitShells.CanvasDrawTool.PenInput
files.Summary: Specialized input handler for pen/stylus tablets. Supports pressure sensitivity, tilt, and pen-specific features. Works with Wacom, Surface Pen, Apple Pencil (via Unity's Pen device).

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.AddStrategy
files.Summary: Example strategy that adds two integers together.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.Bindable<T>
files.Summary: A reactive property wrapper that automatically fires a UnityEvent<T> whenever its value changes. Use this to implement the Observer / Data-Binding pattern without manual event wiring.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.Builder<T>
files.Summary: Abstract base class for the Builder pattern. Extend this class and add fluent setter methods to construct complex objects step-by-step, keeping construction logic separate from the product class itself.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.CommandInvoker
files.Summary: The Invoker in the Command pattern. Executes instances and maintains a history stack that allows undoing operations in LIFO order.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.Component
files.Summary: Base class for all ECS Components. A component is pure data with no behaviour — it describes one aspect of an (e.g. position, health, inventory). Derive from this class to create custom components.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.DraggableItem<T>
files.Summary: Abstract MonoBehaviour base class for draggable UI items in the Drag-and-Drop system. Handles pointer events, canvas hierarchy management (render-on-top), transparency during drag, and optional snap-back to the original position.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.DropZone<T>
files.Summary: Abstract MonoBehaviour base class for Drop Zone areas in a drag-and-drop system. Responds to Unity pointer events (IDropHandler, IPointerEnterHandler, IPointerExitHandler) and delegates acceptance logic to concrete subclasses. Provides visual highlight feedback when a compatible draggable hovers over the zone.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.Entity
files.Summary: Represents a game object in the Entity-Component-System (ECS) pattern. An entity is nothing more than a container of instances — it has no logic itself. Behaviour is provided by systems that query entities for required components.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.FlyweightFactory<TKey, TFlyweight>
files.Summary: Generic Flyweight Factory that caches and reuses flyweight instances keyed by TKey. If a flyweight for a given key already exists it is returned directly, otherwise it is created via the supplied factory delegate and cached.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.FormationUtils
files.Summary: Static utility class that generates world-space Pose lists for common tactical/game unit formations. Each method returns a list of positions and rotations that can be assigned to agents, NPCs, or any Unity objects.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.GenericFactory<TKey, TProduct>
files.Summary: A generic, key-based Factory that creates new product instances on demand. Creator delegates are registered once and called every time a new object is needed, so each call to returns a fresh instance.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.GenericSingleFactory<TKey, TProduct>
files.Summary: Abstract Singleton-per-key Factory that creates at most one instance of TProduct per TKey. On the first call to for a given key the creator is invoked and the result is cached. Subsequent calls return the cached instance.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.HealthComponent
files.Summary: Example ECS component that stores an entity's health points.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.HealthSystem
files.Summary: Example ECS system that operates on entities possessing a . Systems hold the game logic and iterate over relevant entities each update tick.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IBuilder<T>
files.Summary: Defines the contract for the Builder pattern. Implementors construct a product of type T step-by-step and return it via .

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.ICommand
files.Summary: Defines the contract for the Command pattern. Each command encapsulates a single action and its reversal, enabling undo/redo stacks, macro recording, and deferred execution.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IDraggable<T>
files.Summary: Contract for a draggable UI item that carries data of type T. Implement this interface (via ) to participate in drag-and-drop interactions with .

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IFlyweight
files.Summary: Defines the contract for a Flyweight object. The flyweight stores only intrinsic (shared, immutable) state; extrinsic (per-instance) state is passed in via .

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IMediator
files.Summary: Defines the contract for the Mediator pattern. The mediator decouples components (colleagues) by acting as a central hub for communication — instead of referencing each other directly, components send messages through the mediator.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.INodeManager<T>
files.Summary: Defines the contract for a collection manager that stores and queries instances.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IPrototype<T>
files.Summary: Defines the contract for the Prototype pattern. Classes implementing this interface are responsible for producing a deep copy of themselves, allowing the creation of new objects by cloning an existing configured instance rather than constructing one from scratch.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IState
files.Summary: Defines the contract for a single state in the State Machine pattern. Each state owns its own entry, update, and exit logic, keeping behaviour self-contained and easy to extend.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IStrategy<TContext, TResult>
files.Summary: Defines the contract for the Strategy pattern. Each strategy encapsulates one interchangeable algorithm that transforms a TContext value into a TResult value.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.IdleState
files.Summary: Example — represents an entity standing still. Replace the placeholder comments with your own idle behaviour.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.LocalFileSystem
files.Summary: A static async helper for persisting data to the local file system with AES-256 encryption and GZip compression.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.LocalFileSystemException
files.Summary: Exception thrown by when a file operation fails (e.g. wrong password, missing file, or corrupt data).

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.Mediator
files.Summary: A concrete, event-bus style Mediator implementation. Components subscribe to named event channels and are notified whenever another component calls .

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.MonoSingleton<T>
files.Summary: Thread-safe MonoBehaviour Singleton base class. Subclass this to create a manager or service that must have exactly one instance in the scene. The instance is auto-located via FindFirstObjectByType and optionally kept alive across scene loads via DontDestroyOnLoad.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.MoveState
files.Summary: Example — represents an entity in motion. Replace the placeholder comments with your own movement behaviour.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.MovementComponent
files.Summary: Example ECS component that stores an entity's movement speed.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.MultiplyStrategy
files.Summary: Example strategy that multiplies two integers together.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.NodeController<T>
files.Summary: Abstract reactive node wrapper that combines the Builder, Observer, and Bindable patterns into a single unit. Each node wraps a value of type T inside a so that listeners are automatically notified on change. When the node is no longer needed, call to broadcast its removal via .

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.NodesManager<T>
files.Summary: A simple list-backed that stores nodes in insertion order. Duplicate nodes (by reference) are rejected.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.ObjectPool<T>
files.Summary: A generic Object Pool that recycles instances of T to reduce heap allocations and GC pressure. Objects are retrieved with and returned with after use.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.ObserverPattern<T>
files.Summary: A lightweight, generic implementation of the Observer pattern. Maintains a list of subscriber callbacks and notifies them all when a value is published. Prefer this over C# events when you need runtime subscribe/unsubscribe with no delegate leak risk, or when you want to store the observer list as a field rather than as a static event.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.Player
files.Summary: Example product class used to demonstrate the Builder pattern. Represents a game player with a name, health, and movement speed.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.PlayerBuilder
files.Summary: Concrete builder that constructs a using a fluent API. Call the Set* methods in any order, then call to get the result.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.PrintCommand
files.Summary: Example implementation that prints a message to the console. logs an acknowledgement that the print was undone.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.SceneObjectCache
files.Summary:
A lightweight, non-singleton cache for scene objects.

  • Finds the first object of type T in the scene using Unity's FindFirstObjectByType.
  • Caches the found instance per-type to avoid repeated scene searches.
  • If the cached object gets destroyed or is missing, the cache re-finds it on the next access.

Use this when multiple systems need access to a shared scene object without forcing a Singleton pattern.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.ServiceLocator
files.Summary: A global, type-keyed Service Locator that acts as a lightweight alternative to dependency injection. Systems register their implementations once and any other system can retrieve them by interface/type without knowing the concrete class.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.StateMachine
files.Summary: A simple, non-MonoBehaviour State Machine that drives an . Call to transition and each frame to tick the active state.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.StrategyContext<TContext, TResult>
files.Summary: The Context class in the Strategy pattern. Holds a reference to the current strategy and delegates execution to it. The active strategy can be swapped at runtime via .

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.TemplateMethod<TInput, TResult>
files.Summary: Abstract base class for the Template Method pattern. Defines the skeleton of an algorithm in (the template method) while delegating the concrete steps to subclasses via abstract methods. This lets subclasses change specific parts of the algorithm without altering its overall structure.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.TreeFlyweight
files.Summary: Example that stores shared tree mesh and texture data. Many tree instances in the scene can reference a single ; each instance provides its own position via the extrinsic state argument.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.UniqueNodesManager<T, TKey>
files.Summary: A dictionary-backed that groups nodes by a computed key of type TKey. Multiple nodes may share the same key.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Core.UserInputTemplate
files.Summary: Example template that parses a raw string into an integer, with logging at each step.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Draggable
files.Summary: Generic draggable component that works for UI (RectTransform) and world objects. Attach to any GameObject. For UI make sure Canvas has a GraphicRaycaster. For world objects use a PhysicsRaycaster on the camera and a collider on the object.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.ISpiralNode
files.Summary: Contract for a node in a doubly-linked spiral layout list. Each node knows its neighbours, its index in the spiral, and its 2D grid coordinate.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.Packet
files.Summary: A lightweight data transfer container used to send structured messages between systems (e.g. over WebSocket, local IPC, or within the same process).

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.PacketCompressionUtils
files.Summary: Utility class providing GZip compression and decompression helpers for payloads. Use these methods to reduce the wire size of large JSON payloads before sending.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.SpiralDirection
files.Summary: Direction of spiral growth when generating a layout.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.SpiralLayoutContainer
files.Summary: A MonoBehaviour that procedurally arranges GameObjects in a spiral pattern using an for efficient instantiation and reuse.

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.SpiralNode<T>
files.Summary: Abstract MonoBehaviour implementation of that carries typed data payload T. Subclass this to create spiral nodes that display game-specific content (e.g. inventory items, skill icons, quest entries).

files.Title: WitShells.DesignPatterns.WitLogger
files.Summary: A thin wrapper around Unity's Debug logging API that supports a global enable/disable toggle via . Use this instead of Debug.Log directly so that all logging can be silenced in production builds from a single flag.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.Conversation
files.Summary: Represents a conversation containing a sequence of dialogs. Create via Assets > Create > WitShells > Dialogs Manager > Conversation.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.ConversationEvent
files.Summary: Unity event for conversation events.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.ConversationEventArgs
files.Summary: Event arguments for conversation-related events.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogEmotion
files.Summary: Emotion/mood indicators for dialogs.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogEvent
files.Summary: Unity event for dialog events.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogEventArgs
files.Summary: Event arguments for dialog-related events.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods and utilities for the DialogsManager system.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogManager
files.Summary: Manages dialog playback and conversation flow. Singleton pattern ensures only one DialogManager exists in the scene.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogObject
files.Summary: Represents a single dialog entry with content, audio, and metadata. Create via Assets > Create > WitShells > Dialogs Manager > Dialog Object.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogTrigger
files.Summary: A component that triggers conversations based on collision/trigger events. Requires a Collider component on the same GameObject.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogUIController
files.Summary: A base UI controller for displaying dialogs. Extend this class or use it directly for basic dialog UI.

files.Title: WitShells.DialogsManager.DialogsSettings
files.Summary: Settings for the Dialogs Manager system. Create via Assets > Create > WitShells > Dialogs Manager > Dialogs Settings.

files.Title: WitShells.MapView.ConcurrentLoggerBehaviour
files.Summary: ConcurrentLoggerBehaviour receives log messages from any thread via the static Enqueue method and flushes them to the Unity Console inside Update on the main thread. It is created automatically on first use and marked DontDestroyOnLoad.

files.Title: WitShells.MapView.DatabaseUtils
files.Summary: Centralized utility for creating and ensuring proper database schema. All code should use EnsureDatabaseWithSchema instead of ad-hoc CreateTable calls.

files.Title: WitShells.MapView.DatabaseWriter
files.Summary: Thread-safe database writer that ensures serialized write operations to SQLite databases. Manages one dedicated worker thread per database file to prevent write conflicts and ensure data integrity. Uses the singleton pattern to maintain one worker instance per database path.

files.Title: WitShells.MapView.DbQuery
files.Summary: Helper to run read-only database queries on ThreadManager and return results on the main thread.

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.Editor.McqSettingsEditor
files.Summary: Custom editor for McqSettings to improve usability

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqData
files.Summary: Data structure containing a multiple choice question with correct and incorrect options

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqDataSet
files.Summary: ScriptableObject asset for storing MCQ data sets that can be created and edited in the Unity Editor

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqExample
files.Summary: Example script showing how to use the MCQ UI system

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqOptionItem
files.Summary: Individual option item for MCQ questions with selection feedback and animations

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqPage
files.Summary: Main MCQ page component that manages question display and option interactions

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqSettings
files.Summary: Centralized settings for the MCQ UI system. Singleton ScriptableObject that can be accessed globally.

files.Title: WitShells.McqUI.McqUtilities
files.Summary: Utility class for creating and managing MCQ data sets

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.ElevatedRoadMeshSettings
files.Summary: Settings for elevated road mesh generation

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.RibbonMeshSettings
files.Summary: Settings for ribbon mesh generation

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.RoadMeshSettings
files.Summary: Settings for basic road mesh generation

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.SplineMeshBaseSettings
files.Summary: Base settings shared by all spline mesh types

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.SplineMeshExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for easy spline mesh generation

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.SplineMeshType
files.Summary: Defines the types of meshes that can be generated from splines

files.Title: WitShells.SplineRuntime.TunnelMeshSettings
files.Summary: Settings for tunnel mesh generation

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.AnimationEventHandler
files.Summary: Handles animation events for the third-person character. Attach to the GameObject with the Animator component.

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.CinemachineCamLookInput
files.Summary: Handles camera look input for Cinemachine third-person camera. Can use settings from ThirdPersonSettings ScriptableObject or local overrides.

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.SetupThirdPerson
files.Summary: Editor utility to set up a complete third-person character controller. Creates all necessary components, settings, and camera setup.

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.SoundSfxObject
files.Summary: ScriptableObject containing sound effects for the third-person controller. Create via: Create > WitShells > ThirdPersonControl > Sound Effects

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.ThirdPersonControl
files.Summary: Third-person character controller with customizable settings via ScriptableObject. Can receive input from ThirdPersonInput or be controlled directly via properties.

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.ThirdPersonInput
files.Summary: Handles player input using Unity's New Input System PlayerInput component. Requires PlayerInput component with "Move", "Look", "Jump", "Sprint", and "Crouch" actions.

files.Title: WitShells.ThirdPersonControl.ThirdPersonSettings
files.Summary: ScriptableObject containing all third-person controller settings. Create an instance via Create > WitShells > ThirdPersonControl > Settings.

files.Title: WitShells.WebRTCWit.WebRtcTransport
files.Summary: Custom network transport implementation using WebRTC for Unity Netcode. This class handles peer-to-peer connections, data channels, and message routing between clients and server using WebRTC technology.

files.Title: WitShells.WebSocket.Editor.WebSocketTestWindow
files.Summary: Editor window for testing WebSocket connections and functionality. Requires a selected GameObject with a WebSocketHandler component.

files.Title: WitShells.WebSocket.WebSocketBinaryEvent
files.Summary: UnityEvent for binary data.

files.Title: WitShells.WebSocket.WebSocketHandler
files.Summary: A Unity WebSocket client component that provides easy integration with Unity's event system. Handles connection management, message sending/receiving, and provides Unity Events for all operations.

files.Title: WitShells.WebSocket.WebSocketState
files.Summary: Represents the current state of the WebSocket connection.

files.Title: WitShells.WebSocket.WebSocketStringEvent
files.Summary: UnityEvent for string messages.

files.Title: WitShells.WitActor.RigSetupEditorLegacy
files.Summary: Legacy rig setup - redirects to the new WitAnimationRig package. The Animation Rigging functionality has been moved to a separate package: WitAnimationRig

files.Title: WitShells.WitActor.Settings
files.Summary: Settings for the WitActor component.

files.Title: WitShells.WitActor.SoundSfx
files.Summary: Settings for the WitActor component.

files.Title: WitShells.WitClientApi.AuthService
files.Summary: Handles authentication flows (sign-in, sign-out, refresh) separate from WitClientManager. Methods are virtual so a project can inherit and override behavior.

files.Title: WitShells.WitClientApi.EndpointDefinition
files.Summary: Lightweight representation of an endpoint defined in endpoints.json

files.Title: WitShells.WitClientApi.PlayerPrefsTokenStorage
files.Summary: Thread-safe token storage that keeps tokens in-memory for background threads and queues PlayerPrefs writes to be flushed on the main thread. Call InitializeFromPlayerPrefs() on the main thread at startup (WitClientManager does this) and call FlushPendingWrites() periodically on the main thread (WitClientManager.Update does this).

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.AnimationToHumanoidConverter
files.Summary: Advanced Animation to Humanoid Converter Converts constraint-based animations to humanoid muscle-based animation clips

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.Core.BonePoseSystem
files.Summary: AUTHORITATIVE animation writer - the ONLY system allowed to write keyframes All pose edits (FK, IK, Muscle) flow through this system

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.Core.MusclePoseSystem
files.Summary: Muscle-based pose system - HELPER layer only Never writes to AnimationClip directly Forwards all bone transforms to BonePoseSystem

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.Core.SkeletonCache
files.Summary: Authoritative bone registry for humanoid skeletons Caches all bone data for fast lookup by gizmos, IK, and pose systems

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.Core.TwoBoneIKSolver
files.Summary:
Two-Bone IK solver that mirrors Unity Animation Rigging behaviour. Solves entirely from first principles each frame — no incremental delta accumulation — so it never drifts or glitches.

Algorithm:

  1. Compute desired mid-joint position via Law of Cosines.
  2. Use the hint (pole vector) to define the bend plane.
  3. RotateRootToward desiredMid, then RotateMidToward target.
  4. Blend by weight.

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.SceneGizmos.BoneGizmoSystem
files.Summary: Interactive bone gizmos in Scene View Primary UX for bone manipulation

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.SkeletonProfileEditor
files.Summary: Custom editor for SkeletonProfile ScriptableObject

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.WitPoseEditor
files.Summary: Muscle Editor Logic for WitPoseEditor Handles muscle sliders, groups, quick poses, and copy/paste functionality.

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.Editor.WitPoseUtils
files.Summary: Shared utilities for WitPose Editor. Handles string manipulation for bone names and muscle display.

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.PoseData
files.Summary: Data structure for storing and managing human poses. Uses Unity's HumanPose muscle space for rig-agnostic storage.

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.SkeletonProfile.AgeCategory
files.Summary: Age categories for different constraint profiles

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.SkeletonProfile.BodyType
files.Summary: Body types for different constraint profiles

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.SkeletonProfile.BoneConstraint
files.Summary: Constraint data for a specific bone

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.SkeletonProfile
files.Summary: ScriptableObject database storing standard human anatomical limits. Provides default constraint values for different body types and age groups.

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.WitPoseLibrary
files.Summary: Singleton ScriptableObject that stores and manages all saved poses Automatically loads from Resources and persists between sessions

files.Title: WitShells.WitPose.WitPoseVisualSettings
files.Summary: Singleton ScriptableObject that stores visual settings for WitPose editor Automatically loads from Resources and persists between sessions
